lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Hello effendi, I am Shantay.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: I see you're new. Please read the billboard poster before going into the desert. It'll give yer details on the dangers you can face.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: There is a heartbroken mother just past the gates and in the desert. Her name is Irena and she mourns her lost daughter. Such a shame.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Hello again friend. Please read the billboard poster before going into the desert. It'll give yer details on the dangers you can face.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: There is a heartbroken mother just past the gates and in the desert. Her name is Irena and she mourns her lost daughter. Such a shame.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: This is the pass of Shantay. I guard this area with my men. I am responsible for keeping this pass open and repaired.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: My men and I prevent outlaws from getting out of the desert. And we stop the inexperienced from a dry death in the sands. Which would you say you were?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am definitely an outlaw, prepare to die!

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Ha, very funny.....

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Guards arrest [him/her]!

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: You'll have to stay in there until you pay the fine of five gold pieces. Do you want to pay now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, okay.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Good, I see that you have come to your senses.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Great Effendi, now please try to keep the peace.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: You don't have that kind of cash on you I see.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: You are to be transported to a maximum security prison in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: I hope you've learnt an important lesson from this.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: I would transport you to a maximum security prison in Port Sarim. However since you haven't unlocked access to Asgarnia consider yourself lucky.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: But perhaps you have some in your bank? Or would you prefer the maximum security prison in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Which is it going to be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pay the fine.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Okay then..., you'll need access to your bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, you're not having my money.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Very well, I grow tired of you, you'll be taken to a new jail in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, you're not having my money.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: You have a choice. You can either pay five gold pieces or... You can be transported to a maximum security prison in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Will you pay the five gold pieces?

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: You are to be transported to a maximum security prison in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: I hope you've learnt an important lesson from this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am a little inexperienced.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Can I recommend that you purchase a full waterskin and a knife! These items will no doubt save your life. A waterskin will keep water from evaporating in the desert.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: And a keen woodsman with a knife can extract the juice from a cactus. Before you go into the desert, it's advisable to wear desert clothes. It's very hot in the desert and you'll surely cook if you wear armour.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: To keep the pass bandit free, we charge a small toll of five gold pieces. You can buy a desert pass from me, just ask me to open the shop. You can also use our free banking services by clicking on the chest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do I have to pay to go into the desert?

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Effendi, you insult me! I am not interested in making a profit from you! I merely seek to cover my expenses in keeping this pass open.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: There is repair work to carry out and also the men's wages to consider. For the paltry sum of 5 Gold pieces, I think we offer a great service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, neither, I'm an adventurer.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Great, I have just the thing for the desert adventurer. I sell desert clothes which will keep you cool in the heat of the desert. I also sell waterskins so that you won't die in the desert.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: A waterskin and a knife help you survive from the juice of a cactus. Use the chest to store your items, we'll take them to the bank. It's hot in the desert, you'll bake in all that armour.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: To keep the pass open we ask for 5 gold pieces. And we give you a Shantay Pass, just ask to see what I sell to buy one.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: You should be in jail! Well, no doubt the authorities in Port Sarim know what they're doing. But if you get into any more trouble, you'll be stuck back in jail.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I see what you have to sell please?

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Absolutely Effendi!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I must be going.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: So long...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to buy a Shantay pass for 5 gold coins.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Sorry effendi, I can't offer this service right now.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Sorry friend, the Shantay Pass is 5 gold coins. You don't seem to have enough money!

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Sorry friend, you'll need more inventory space to buy a pass.

sections.title: While locked in the Shantay Pass jail

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: If you want to be let out, you have to pay a fine of five gold. Do you want to pay now?

sections.title: After escaping out of the "Maximum security prison" or the Shantay Pass jail

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: You should be in jail! Well, no doubt the authorities in Port Sarim know what they're doing. But if you get into any more trouble, you'll be stuck back in jail.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Sorry effendi, I can't offer this service right now.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Sorry friend, the Shantay Pass is 5 gold coins. You don't seem to have enough money!

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Sorry friend, you'll need more inventory space to buy a pass.

lines.speaker: Shantay
lines.text: Well done.
